ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the passenger belongs to (adult/child) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0/1) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "embarkation_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation point */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin (1/2/3) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., booked, canceled, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin (1/2/3) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of passengers in the cabin */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_cabin_class FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_class") REFERENCES tickets ("cabin_class")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation point */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "survival_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0/1) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin (1/2/3) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members on board */,
  "embarkation_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation point */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket at the time of the emergency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_embarkation_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_point_id") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the passenger (husband/wife/child/parent/sibling) */,
  "family_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "siblings" (
  "sibling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sibling */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "sibling_name" TEXT /* Name of the sibling */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the sibling */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the sibling (male/female) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sibling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_siblings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the parent */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the parent (male/female) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "child_name" TEXT /* Name of the child */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the child */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the child (male/female) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spouses" (
  "spouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spouse */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the spouse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the spouse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the spouse (male/female) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spouses_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
